subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter thou didst write, numbered 158, addressed to his honour Munshádí, was perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ای که به نمر ۱۵۸ مرقوم نموده بودید به حضرت منشادی ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to unity; prohibition of disunity, @relationship between government and people, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
